system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Aarav Ahmed. I need some help with my reservations. I’d like to cancel two of my upcoming bookings—confirmation codes IFOYYZ and NQNU5R. Also, I want to upgrade my third reservation (M20IZO) to business class. Please use my credit card ending in 7334 for any charges or refunds, and I’m happy to follow your policies for these changes. Can you assist me with this?

I am unable to retrieve your reservation details at the moment due to a technical issue. As a result, I cannot proceed with your cancellation and upgrade requests right now.

I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further. YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

final_response:
I am unable to retrieve your reservation details at the moment due to a technical issue. As a result, I cannot proceed with your cancellation and upgrade requests right now.

I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further. YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.
